training_status: Former athlete and bicycle racer; disease-limited exercise in recent years; now able to walk 2 miles

benefits.description: Reduced facial swelling within a week
No longer exhausted and crashing after activity; able to work in yard the day after first dose without tiring
Muscles no longer failing rapidly; exercise performance dramatically improved from near-zero capacity
Strongly reduces inflammation; anti-inflammatory effects kicked in by 2nd day
Improved metabolism; feels more normal overall; more active

side_effects.description: Needs to take slightly more thyroid medication; feels cold without it despite living in a warm climate

protocol_notes: Started at 2mg, then 3mg, then 4mg. Dose lasts approximately 5 days. No significant side effects noted during titration. Reports being 20 pounds from ideal weight.
